title.zh: Workshop 活動介紹：從想法到可上線作品的一日實戰
title.en: Workshop Spotlight: From Idea to Shippable Prototype in One Day

content.zh: 今年 iPlayground 2026 將新增 Workshop 專場，為想把「聽懂」進一步變成「做得出來」的開發者設計。這場活動以小班制進行，從需求拆解、介面規劃、資料流設計，到實作與測試，帶你完整走過一次產品開發流程。內容會聚焦在 Apple 生態系常見的開發情境，包含 SwiftUI 畫面組裝、狀態管理、API 串接、錯誤處理與效能基本檢查，並安排導師與助教即時協作，協助你在現場排除卡關問題。無論你是剛入門、準備轉職，或希望把 side project 推進到可展示版本，都能在這個工作坊獲得可直接帶回團隊的實作經驗。名額有限，後續將公布報名方式、適合對象與建議先備條件，歡迎先把時間保留下來。
content.en: iPlayground 2026 is introducing a hands-on workshop track designed for developers who want to move from understanding concepts to actually shipping. In a small-group format, participants will walk through the full product cycle: requirement breakdown, UI planning, data flow design, implementation, and testing. The session focuses on practical Apple-platform scenarios, including SwiftUI composition, state management, API integration, error handling, and baseline performance checks. Mentors and assistants will provide live guidance so blockers can be resolved on the spot. Whether you're just getting started, preparing for a career switch, or pushing a side project to a demo-ready state, this workshop is built to deliver practical output you can bring back to your team. Registration details, prerequisites, and target audience will be announced soon.

title.zh: 推薦贊助商，免費拿 iPlayground 門票！
title.en: Recommend a Sponsor and Get a Free iPlayground Ticket!

content.zh: iPlayground 2026 將於 7/25–7/26 在政大公企中心舉辦，預計匯聚超過 300 位 iOS 工程師、產品開發者與設計師。為了讓活動內容更完整，我們正在徵求社群夥伴協助引薦潛在贊助商。即日起至 5/22，若引薦成功並進入合作流程，我們將致贈 iPlayground 2026 兩日票一張與紀念 T-shirt。
content.en: iPlayground 2026 will take place on July 25-26 at NCCU CPBAE, bringing together 300+ iOS engineers, product builders, and designers. We are looking for sponsor referrals from the community. If your referral leads to a sponsorship conversation and partnership by May 22, we will thank you with one two-day iPlayground 2026 ticket and a commemorative shirt.

title.en: iPlayground 2026 Call for Proposals is Now Open!

content.zh: 我們誠摯邀請對 iOS、AI、產品開發或任何有趣技術主題有熱情的講者投稿。無論你是資深開發者或新生代工程師，都歡迎在 iPlayground 舞台分享你的實戰經驗與觀點。
content.en: We warmly invite speakers passionate about iOS, AI, product development, or any exciting technology. Whether you're a seasoned expert or an emerging developer, iPlayground is the best stage to share your knowledge.
